title: cuphea urbaniana
intro: Cuphea urbaniana, also known as Mexican Heather, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Lythraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cuphea urbaniana include reducing fever, relieving digestive problems, and supporting respiratory health. Cuphea urbaniana can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture by mixing the dried plant material with a solvent like alcohol or glycerin.
